roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of PRCS PC 3455, PC 1203.2

/CAL:TO SET APD 3455PC/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/DEF:ABIDE BY CURFEW FROM 7PM TO 6AM/WS//DEF:NOT DRIVE WITHOUT VALID LICENSE/DEF:ALLOWED TO BREAK CURFEW WHEN CHILDIS BORN WITH PRE-APPROVAL FROM THE SHERIFF/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TO SET APD 3455PC/DOP/
/X:JUDGE LIN APPERS VIA ZOOM/CTORD:PRCS IS REINSTATED AND EXPIRES ON 09-15-22/
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOT/CON:NEIL HALLINAN/X:WIA ON PRCS/SHER/X:PRCS REVOKED/NB/CONTD:TS APD 3455PC/
